labels.name: email_audit_deliverability
labels.description:
Use this when you need to audit email deliverability configuration for a domain. Returns structured JSON with authentication record analysis and a deliverability score 0-100. POST variant of email_audit_deliverability -- same params passed as JSON body instead of query string.

1. score (number 0-10

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: email_audit_deliverability, email_audit_deliverability · Private data: email_audit_deliverability, email_audit_deliverability · Public sink: email_audit_deliverability, email_audit_deliverability.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: email_audit_deliverability, email_audit_deliverability · Private data: email_audit_deliverability, email_audit_deliverability · Public sink: email_audit_deliverability, email_audit_deliverability

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "email_audit_deliverability" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet:

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
